Data.Message:
OrderEntryAssistant execution error: System.InvalidOperationException: A trigger monitoring session is already active. UiPath.Core.Activities.TriggerScope 'Watch Submit Shortcut' could not start a second concurrent monitoring session in the same execution; nested or parallel Trigger Scopes are not supported.
   at UiPath.Core.Activities.TriggerScope.StartMonitoring(NativeActivityContext context)
   at UiPath.Core.Activities.TriggerScope.Execute(NativeActivityContext context)
   at System.Activities.NativeActivityContext.ScheduleActivity(Activity activity)
   at System.Activities.Statements.Parallel.Execute(NativeActivityContext context)
